assertions.assertion: Output calls AddClientCredentialsTokenManagement() to register the token management services
Output calls .AddClient() with at least TokenEndpoint, ClientId, and Scope configured
assertions.rationale: Standard configuration pattern from getting started docs

assertions.assertion: Output registers an HTTP client with AddClientCredentialsHttpClient or AddClientCredentialsTokenHandler
Output does NOT require any sub-documents to answer correctly (core SKILL.md is sufficient)
assertions.rationale: Without skill doc, response likely uses v3 patterns (raw strings, no Parse methods) which may not fully match v4 expectations
